ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sleep_studies" (
  "study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sleep study */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel of the EEG reading */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the EEG signal */,
  "spindle" INTEGER /* Index of the spindle detected */,
  "time_of_night" REAL /* Time of night when the reading was taken */,
  "stop_time" REAL /* Time when the spindle activity stops */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was conducted */,
  "study_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the study */,
  "sleep_stage" TEXT /* Sleep stage during which the reading was taken */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate during the study */,
  "respiration_rate" INTEGER /* Respiration rate during the study */,
  "oxygen_saturation" INTEGER /* Oxygen saturation level during the study */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of any significant events during the study */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "channel", "spindle")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Researcher's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Researcher's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Researcher's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Researcher's phone number */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies_metadata" (
  "study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the researcher */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was conducted */,
  "study_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each sleep study
Time of night when the reading was taken
Time when the spindle activity stops
Date when the study was conducted
Sleep stage during which the reading was taken
Oxygen saturation level during the study
Description of any significant events during the study

Date and time when the study data was last updated
Date and time when the patient record was created
Date and time when the patient record was last updated
